label: Growing trend: effect not distinguishable from zero
verdict: The effect is not distinguishable from zero. The estimated ad impact is 5.5K streams with a 95% credible interval of −7.5K to 24K that spans zero. Streams rose over the window, but that movement is explained by the underlying upward trend and ordinary week-to-week noise, not by the ad, so on this evidence we cannot claim the campaign moved streams.
